prompt: Describe the multi-bar chart comparing urban households' monthly spending on food, education and entertainment in 2019 vs 2024, and give comments.
essay:
The bar chart compares the monthly expenditure of Chinese urban households on three major items, namely food, education and entertainment, in 2019 and 2024. Three noteworthy similarities and differences can be identified.

On one hand, all three categories recorded an upward trajectory, suggesting a broad-based rise in household purchasing power. On the other hand, the magnitude varies dramatically: food spending rose modestly by roughly 22%, from ¥1800 to ¥2200; education spending more than doubled, climbing from ¥600 to ¥1400; while entertainment spending also more than doubled, increasing from ¥500 to ¥1100.

Two underlying factors are worth considering. Firstly, the growing emphasis on children's academic training has pushed education costs up sharply. Secondly, as material needs are increasingly satisfied, urban residents are channelling a larger share of disposable income into leisure and cultural consumption.

Taken together, the pattern signals a transition from subsistence-oriented to quality-oriented consumption.

band_description.official_text: 较好地完成了试题规定的任务。能够描述和解释图表内容，较充分地阐述观点；能够运用较丰富的语法结构和词汇；基本没有或仅有个别语言错误。
band_description.source: 2025 考研英语二大纲 B 节 第四档 11–13 分

boundary_decision.compared_with_higher: 归因段仅双因素直陈，缺辩证或反思（如疫情对教育焦虑的加剧）；academic tier 词汇（如 `household heterogeneity / Engel-style re-balancing`）尚未使用；结论段一句话，可扩展
boundary_decision.compared_with_lower: multi_bar 七要素齐全：两组对比（2019 vs 2024）+ 三个相似（均上升）+ 三个量化差异（22% / 超过一倍 ×2）+ 双归因 + 宏观评论；6/6 数据点全精确；`upward trajectory / subsistence-oriented` high-tier

intra_band_adjustment.reason: 档内中位 11 分——结构完整 + 数据精确 + high-tier 稳定 4 处，但归因与结论未达第五档厚度

dimension_diagnosis.task_completion: multi_bar 核心能力全覆盖：明示两组时间（2019 / 2024）、先点相似（均上升）后指差异（涨幅 22% vs 133% vs 120%）、双因素归因、宏观评论收尾
dimension_diagnosis.grammar_lexis: 非限定状语（suggesting a broad-based rise）+ 现在分词（climbing / increasing / channelling）+ 平行（from X to Y ×3）+ high-tier（trajectory / subsistence-oriented / quality-oriented / disposable income）
dimension_diagnosis.cohesion: On one hand / On the other hand / Firstly / Secondly / Taken together 层次清晰

format_register.format: 四段标准图表作文（总述 → 相似+差异对比 → 归因 → 结论）

chart_subtype_specific.data_coverage_note: 6 个数据点（3 项 × 2 年）全覆盖且精确

errors.original: Taken together, the pattern signals a transition from subsistence-oriented to quality-oriented consumption.
errors.correction: Taken together, these divergent growth rates signal a structural transition from subsistence-oriented to quality-oriented consumption, a shift increasingly characteristic of middle-income Chinese urban households.
errors.rationale: 扩展结论段并加 academic tier 词（structural transition / middle-income）可冲击第五档

vocabulary_upgrades.original: growing emphasis on children's academic training
vocabulary_upgrades.suggestion: intensifying parental investment in offspring's human capital
propelled education outlays to new heights

rationale_trace.rubric_ref: 考研 B 节字数扣分规则

evidence: 后指差异（22% / 超过一倍 ×2）

rationale_trace.claim: 官方 rubric 比对 → 第四档中位 11 分
evidence: 未达第五档 academic 密度
rationale_trace.rubric_ref: 2025 考研英二大纲 B 节 第四档 11-13 分

final_feedback: 这是 multi_bar 子类的典范作文：两组时间（2019/2024）+ 三类别（食/教/娱）全部精确对应，先指相似（均上升）后指差异（22% vs 133% vs 120%），体现了 multi_bar 的核心能力——『不能只描述一组』。现在分词链 `climbing / increasing / channelling`、平行结构 `from X to Y ×3`、high-tier 词 `upward trajectory / subsistence-oriented / disposable income` 共同支撑了第四档 11 分。若要冲击第五档 13 分，只需把结论段扩展为 2-3 句、加入一处 academic tier（如 `structural transition` 或 `human capital`），以及在归因段补一句辩证反思（如『当然，教育投入的激增也折射出社会焦虑的集体放大，未必全然正面』）。
